chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1555 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7493/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.7494/2021 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No.7495/2021 (Stay) 26-10-2021 Mr. Allah Bux Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. The petitioner has sought the following prayers: (a) To quash the notice No.AC/2263/2021 dated 21.10.2021 issued by Respondent No.4 and declare the notice (annexure G) is illegal and ultra vires and null and void. (b) To restrain the respondents not to take any action and disposes and demolish any construction of the petitioner from his lands till final disposal of this petition. (c) To grant any other relief, which this Honourable deems fit and proper in circumstances of the case. (d) To award the costs of this Petition. On perusal of the record, it appears that the petitioner seeks clarification / interpretation of some order passed by the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal, Sukkur dated 16-10-2021, on the basis of which purportedly the impugned notice has been issued. The petition, on the face of it, does not appear to be maintainable and is accordingly dismissed. However, the petitioner may approach the Tribunal for redressal of his grievance and if further aggrieved, then further remedy as may be available in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
